title: Air
logline: A Nike basketball marketing executive risks everything to sign rookie Michael Jordan and create the Air Jordan brand that would revolutionize sports marketing forever.
antagonistOrConflict: Corporate competition (Adidas/Converse) and internal Nike resistance
tone: Energetic, aspirational, with corporate tension and underdog spirit

actBreaks.description: Setup concludes with Sonny's initial contact with Jordan's agent and the challenge being established

validation.ruling: Scene #24 effectively closes Act 1 by transitioning from setup to action. Sonny's unauthorized $250k offer to Falk represents his point of no return - he's now committed to an unsanctioned strategy that puts his career at risk. The scene establishes the new status quo: they have a shot at Jordan but Sonny must pursue increasingly bold moves. This perfectly launches Act 2's complications and obstacles.

actBreaks.description: Midpoint transition after Sonny's unauthorized trip to meet Jordan's parents, shifting from pursuit to negotiation

validation.ruling: Scene #60 serves as an ideal Act 2 closer by showing the team's final preparation and strategic planning before the climactic presentation. All elements are in place - the custom shoes, the marketing strategy, the choreographed meeting plan. This represents the calm before the storm and the last moment of preparation before the ultimate test. The scene transitions perfectly from preparation to execution, setting up Act 3's resolution phase.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: Corporate underdog story with escalating stakes and mounting pressure, building to a make-or-break presentation
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: Fast-paced first act establishing the competitive landscape, slower character-driven second act with Sonny's personal mission, accelerating final act with high-stakes negotiations and resolution

incitingIncident.description: Phil Knight meets with Sonny in his office, discussing strategy while observing a mysterious skateboarder outside, as Sonny challenges the traditional approach of splitting their budget

validation.ruling: Scene #4 perfectly establishes the inciting incident. Phil's revelation of Nike's first quarterly loss and layoffs creates the crisis that demands action. This financial threat forces the shift from their standard strategy to Sonny's high-risk pursuit of Michael Jordan. The scene establishes both the external problem (financial crisis) and internal conflict (Sonny vs. Strasser's conservative approach), launching the central story question of whether Nike can land Jordan to save the company.

midpoint.description: Deloris Jordan meets Sonny in the backyard, discusses the family's deep roots in the land, calls his visit presumptuous but respects his action, reveals Michael is home but won't let Sonny see him

validation.ruling: Scene #34 serves as a powerful midpoint revelation. Deloris Jordan's philosophical conversation about family history and doing something about what you want represents the story's emotional core shift. This isn't just about business anymore - it's about legacy, family, and personal connection. Sonny's vulnerable story about his mother's death and his name's origin creates the human bond that will ultimately win the Jordans over. The ghost-like presence of Michael upstairs symbolizes the prize within reach but not yet attained.

climax.description: In the crucial Nike meeting, Michael Jordan admits preferring Lakers and Adidas initially. The team presents the red and black Air Jordan 1s, explaining custom features. When Jordan questions the non-regulation colors, Strasser boldly challenges NBA rules. Phil makes his strategic delayed entrance.
climax.sceneHeading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - CONFERENCE ROOM - DAY

validation.ruling: Scene #64 is the definitive climax - the culmination of all story threads in Nike's presentation to Michael Jordan. This is where Sonny's entire strategy, the custom shoes, the rule-breaking red and black design, and months of preparation either succeed or fail. The scene contains the story's highest stakes moment with Jordan's reaction to the presentation determining Nike's future. The Jordan family's bored expressions create maximum tension, making this the ultimate test of whether Sonny's unconventional approach will pay off.

scenes.heading: EXT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - DAY
scenes.summary: 1984 Nike headquarters introduction - stark contrast between modern expectations and reality of two modest buildings resembling IRS offices rather than a sneaker empire

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - CONFERENCE ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Strasser presents to bored Basketball Division meeting about declining sales and upcoming draft bids, revealing they can't get top picks Olajuwon or Jordan, planning to split budget between Barkley and Bowie

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - CAFETERIA - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny and Strasser discuss draft strategy in cafeteria, revealing their limited $250k budget for three players and Sonny's preference for truth over team diplomacy

scenes.heading: INT. PHIL KNIGHT’S OFFICE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Phil Knight meets with Sonny in his office, discussing strategy while observing a mysterious skateboarder outside, as Sonny challenges the traditional approach of splitting their budget
scenes.turningPointNote: Sonny begins to question Nike's conservative approach

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - HALLWAY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Late night at Nike headquarters with only a janitor present, setting the scene for Sonny's solitary work

scenes.heading: INT. SONNY’S OFFICE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Sonny alone in his office surrounded by VHS tapes of players, studying game footage while contemplating Nike's mission statement about change and perfection

scenes.heading: INT. GROCERY STORE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Sonny grocery shopping late at night, stops to stare at Larry Bird on Wheaties box wearing Converse shoes, highlighting the competition's market dominance

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. SONNY’S CAR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Sonny sits in his car eating strawberry shortcake ice cream bars frantically, revealing his stress and emotional eating habits

scenes.heading: EXT. VACARRO HOUSEHOLD - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Sonny arrives home and destroys evidence of his ice cream binge, throwing away the remaining bars and torn box

scenes.heading: INT. VACARRO HOUSEHOLD - SONNY’S OFFICE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Sonny watches player tape and ESPN at home, notices Arthur Ashe tennis commercial about the racket he won Wimbledon with, sparking an idea about personal connection to equipment
scenes.turningPointNote: Arthur Ashe commercial plants seed of inspiration

scenes.heading: INT. STRASSER’S OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny bursts into Strasser's meeting, dismisses the executive, and shows Jordan's game-winning shot against Georgetown, declaring he found 'the icon tree' in North Carolina
scenes.turningPointNote: Sonny identifies Jordan as their target

scenes.heading: INT. SONNY'S OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny rushes to his office to make an important phone call

scenes.heading: INT. PROSERV AGENCY - DAVID FALK’S OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny calls agent David Falk about Jordan, who laughs off Nike's chances and reveals Jordan won't even take a meeting with Nike, preferring Adidas

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - STRASSER’S OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Strasser watches Jordan tape while Sonny lies about Falk's response, claiming they have a great shot when they don't, planning to pitch their entire budget

scenes.heading: INT. RESTAURANT - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Sonny has dinner with Stu Inman, Portland Trailblazers GM who passed on Jordan in the draft, seeking insight while everyone assumes Nike is leaving basketball

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - HALLWAY - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny arrives at Phil's office to find Strasser already there waiting for him

scenes.heading: INT. PHIL KNIGHT'S OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Phil immediately says no to Sonny's Jordan pitch, but Sonny argues Jordan is entertainment and the future, comparing him to their past mistakes with other players
scenes.turningPointNote: Phil rejects the Jordan pursuit initially

scenes.heading: EXT. ADIDAS HEADQUARTERS - DAY
scenes.summary: Establishing shot of imposing Adidas headquarters in Germany, showcasing their dominance with museum containing Jesse Owens' and Muhammad Ali's shoes

scenes.heading: INT. ADIDAS HEADQUARTERS - CONFERENCE ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Adidas executives including matriarch Kathe Dassler and son Horst discuss their draft strategy from their position of strength

scenes.heading: EXT. CONVERSE HEADQUARTERS - DAY
scenes.summary: Exterior of Converse headquarters in Massachusetts, a towering brick building with their All Star logo prominently displayed

scenes.heading: INT. CONVERSE HEADQUARTERS - CONFERENCE ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Converse executives review their draft board with Olajuwon already circled and Bowie crossed out, confidently considering Jordan

scenes.heading: INT. PHIL KNIGHT'S OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Phil asks if they can get a meeting with Jordan, Strasser questions the decision, but Falk immediately refuses

scenes.heading: INT. SONNY'S OFFICE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Sonny negotiates with Falk for a meeting, offers $250k to get Jordan's attention, while Falk warns about the family dynamics and Adidas preference

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - CONFERENCE ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Sonny tells Strasser about the fake $250k offer and considers calling Jordan's parents directly, while dealing with illness and fatigue from overwork

scenes.heading: INT. SONNY'S OFFICE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Sonny attempts to call Jordan's parents in North Carolina but hangs up before completing the call, showing his nervousness about the bold move

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - SONNY’S OFFICE - MORNING
scenes.summary: Strasser discovers Sonny missing from his office despite his car being in the parking lot

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - STRASSER'S OFFICE - MORNING
scenes.summary: Sonny calls Strasser from airport payphone, revealing his impulsive decision to fly to North Carolina to meet Jordan's parents in person
scenes.turningPointNote: Sonny makes desperate move to go to Carolina

scenes.heading: INT. PDX TERMINAL - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny at Portland airport telling Strasser he's boarding a flight to North Carolina, claiming a face-to-face meeting is more professional than a cold call

scenes.heading: EXT. WILMINGTON AIRPORT - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny arrives at humid Wilmington airport, experiencing the different world of the American South

scenes.heading: EXT. RENTAL CAR PARKING LOT - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny reluctantly rents an embarrassing minivan, the only vehicle available for his unplanned trip

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. - SONNY’S RENTAL CAR - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny drives through North Carolina highways with a map spread across his dashboard, searching for the Jordan residence

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. - SONNY’S RENTAL CAR - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny arrives at the Jordan family driveway

scenes.heading: EXT. JORDAN RESIDENCE - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny meets James Jordan working on a car in the front yard, introduces himself as being from Nike, as Deloris calls from inside

scenes.heading: EXT. JORDAN RESIDENCE - BACKYARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Deloris Jordan meets Sonny in the backyard, discusses the family's deep roots in the land, calls his visit presumptuous but respects his action, reveals Michael is home but won't let Sonny see him
scenes.turningPointNote: Crucial meeting with Deloris Jordan who controls access to Michael

scenes.heading: EXT. CAROLINA HIGHWAY - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny drives through Carolina countryside after meeting the Jordans, taking in the Spanish moss and industrial landscape

scenes.heading: EXT. EMSLEY A. LANEY HIGH SCHOOL - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny arrives at Michael Jordan's high school, Emsley A. Laney High School

scenes.heading: INT. EMSLEY A. LANEY HIGH SCHOOL - HALLWAY - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny wanders the high school hallways, drawn by the sound of basketballs bouncing in the gymnasium

scenes.heading: INT. EMSLEY A. LANEY HIGH SCHOOL - GYM - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny observes JV basketball practice in the gym where Jordan once played, meeting the atmosphere of small-town basketball

scenes.heading: INT. EMSLEY A. LANEY HIGH SCHOOL - POP’S OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Coach Pop Herring explains to Sonny why he cut Michael Jordan from the team, revealing it was about making Jordan human and relatable, not about his lack of talent
scenes.turningPointNote: Pop provides crucial insight into Jordan's character

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. RENTAL CAR - EVENING
scenes.summary: Sonny drives back toward the airport through the Carolina evening, contemplating his visit as Southern night comes alive

scenes.heading: EXT. RENTAL CAR PARKING LOT - EVENING
scenes.summary: Sonny returns the rental van to the same employee at the airport parking lot

scenes.heading: INT. PLANE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: On the flight home, Sonny gets peanuts with plastic captain's wings attached, examining the gold plastic wings with newfound inspiration

scenes.heading: INT. SONNY'S OFFICE - MORNING
scenes.summary: Sonny receives angry call from Falk about showing up at the Jordan house, but Falk reveals the visit worked and the Jordans will come to Nike on Tuesday
scenes.turningPointNote: Jordan family agrees to visit Nike headquarters

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - HALLWAY - DAY
scenes.summary: Strasser discovers Sonny's office empty upon arriving at work

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - STRASSER'S OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny surprises Strasser by waiting in his office, announces Jordan is coming to Beaverton and they need to prepare intensively

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - ELEVATOR - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny and Strasser take the elevator down to Nike's basement laboratory

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE SHOE LAB - DAY
scenes.summary: They meet Peter Moore in Nike's shoe lab, requesting the most beautiful basketball shoes ever made

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - SHOE LAB - DESIGN ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: In the design room, Sonny explains his vision for individualized shoes built around the athlete rather than generic designs, as mysterious skateboarding Tinker Hatfield arrives
scenes.turningPointNote: Concept for personalized Jordan shoes emerges

scenes.heading: INT. PHIL KNIGHT'S OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny pitches Phil on giving Jordan their entire budget plus unprecedented revenue percentage, arguing the game is changing and they need to get ahead of it

scenes.heading: EXT. CONVERSE HEADQUARTERS - DAY
scenes.summary: Jordan family arrives at Converse headquarters in a limousine, greeted by executives John O'Neil and Joe Dean, with Michael's face still unseen

scenes.heading: INT. CONVERSE HEADQUARTERS - CONFERENCE ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: At Converse headquarters, executives pitch Michael Jordan (whose face remains unseen) by showing their commercial featuring Larry Bird and Magic Johnson, emphasizing their roster of NBA legends and promising to treat Jordan like royalty.

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - SHOE LAB - DESIGN ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: At Nike's design room, Sonny reviews shoe prototypes with the design team but finds them too bland and wants more red color. Peter Moore explains the NBA's 51% white rule would result in fines for Jordan if violated.

scenes.heading: EXT. PORTLAND ROAD - DAY
scenes.summary: Phil Knight emerges from his house in running gear, stretching in the mystical morning fog as he prepares for a run, contemplating the difficulty of getting started.

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - HALLWAY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Sonny and Strasser wander Nike's empty hallways on a Saturday night. Sonny philosophizes about the arbitrary nature of seven-day weeks and astronomical cycles while they work overtime.

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - CONFERENCE ROOM
scenes.summary: In Nike's conference room, Strasser reflects on the company's growth feeling different than expected. Sonny responds with evolutionary metaphors and discusses how 'meaningful work' is a recent concept, suggesting work isn't meant to solve life's other problems.

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - SHOE LAB - DAY
scenes.summary: The design team reveals the completed Air Jordan 1s for the first time - beautiful, high-cut shoes with distinctive color blocking, prominent Nike swoosh, and Air Jordan pilot wings logo that appear both timeless and futuristic.
scenes.turningPointNote: First reveal of the iconic Air Jordan 1 design

scenes.heading: INT. PHIL KNIGHT'S OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: In Phil's office, Sonny reports working all weekend while Phil notes the company has grown beyond needing everyone to work weekends. Phil asks what Sonny would name their Michael Jordan line, implying confidence in landing the deal.

scenes.heading: INT. STRASSER'S OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny rushes to Strasser's office needing a name for the Jordan line. Their discussion is interrupted by Richard, who overhears about signing Michael Jordan, forcing them to deflect suspicion about their secret negotiations.

scenes.heading: INT. ADIDAS HEADQUARTERS - CONFERENCE ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: At Adidas headquarters, the Dassler family and executives pitch Michael Jordan (face still unseen), positioning him as next-generation talent who should stand apart from the aging Magic and Bird, showing him leather shoe prototypes.

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - CONFERENCE ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The night before the crucial Nike meeting, Sonny briefs his team on psychology - people make important decisions within five seconds, like judging dates. He strategically plans Phil's delayed entrance to avoid looking desperate.

scenes.heading: INT. SONNY'S OFFICE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Late at night, Sonny remains at his desk under moonlight. Strasser checks on him, suggesting he go home and get sleep. Strasser admits he still thinks Sonny is crazy but they're prepared for tomorrow's meeting.

scenes.heading: EXT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny waits in Nike's parking lot, watching a plane cross the sky like a dot on a string. A limo arrives with Falk, then Deloris and James Jordan emerge. James jokes about Sonny's van from their previous meeting.

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - ENTRANCE - DAY
scenes.summary: Nike's entrance displays a banner welcoming the Jordan family, with a full Hardee's feast spread out. Deloris notes Oregon doesn't have Hardee's, while James discreetly confirms they flew it in specially for the meeting.

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - CONFERENCE ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: In the crucial Nike meeting, Michael Jordan admits preferring Lakers and Adidas initially. The team presents the red and black Air Jordan 1s, explaining custom features. When Jordan questions the non-regulation colors, Strasser boldly challenges NBA rules. Phil makes his strategic delayed entrance.
scenes.turningPointNote: The pivotal presentation meeting with Michael Jordan

scenes.heading: INT. SONNY'S OFFICE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Exhausted after the meeting, Sonny finally allows himself to close his eyes and rest at his desk under the moonlight, suggesting cautious optimism about the presentation's success.

scenes.heading: INT. SONNY'S OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny is awakened by Falk's furious phone call about a contract clause requiring Jordan to achieve specific benchmarks or Nike can void the deal. Falk threatens he's already called Adidas, putting the entire deal in jeopardy.
scenes.turningPointNote: Contract crisis threatens to derail the Jordan deal

scenes.heading: INT. NIKE HEADQUARTERS - PHIL’S OFFICE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Sonny confronts Phil about the undisclosed contract clause. Phil defends the decision and refuses Sonny's demand to offer Jordan a percentage of sales. In frustration, Sonny dramatically takes down a framed photo from Phil's wall.

scenes.heading: INT. SONNY'S OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny calls the Jordan household, reaching out directly to try to salvage the deal as time runs out on their negotiations.

scenes.heading: INT. JORDAN RESIDENCE - KITHCEN - DAY
scenes.summary: Deloris Jordan chastises Sonny for calling directly this time. Michael expresses concerns about the performance clauses and potential injury risks. Sonny reassures him about becoming rookie of the year with the offense running through him.

scenes.heading: INT. SONNY'S OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Sonny speaks with Falk about Nike's revised offer including percentage of sales. Falk confirms Adidas won't match that term and is pivoting to Mel Turpin instead. Sonny celebrates the breakthrough with cautious optimism about their five-year partnership.
scenes.turningPointNote: Nike secures Jordan with unprecedented percentage of sales offer

scenes.heading: INT. PHIL KNIGHT'S OFFICE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Phil sits alone bouncing his plastic basketball when Sonny visits. Phil muses that Sonny seems to have always existed as he is, joking he'll be making deals in heaven. Sonny admits he initially mispronounced 'Nike' and Phil reveals he wanted to call the company 'Dimension Six.'

scenes.heading: INT. GROCERY STORE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: At a grocery store, Sonny sees Michael Jordan on a Wheaties box wearing Nikes. He smiles, knowing this is just the beginning of their success.

scenes.heading: EXT. VACARRO HOUSEHOLD - EVENING
scenes.summary: Sonny sneaks out for his first run in sweatpants and Nike gear. Title cards reveal Nike's Air Jordan exceeded goals dramatically - from $3M target to $162M actual, now $3B annually. Despite his ambitions, Sonny only makes it one block before stopping, gasping - but it's a start.
scenes.turningPointNote: Epilogue showing the massive success of Air Jordan and Sonny's personal growth
